data.description: KALSHI BETS SIGNAL 33-DAY DHS SHUTDOWN Prediction markets now see a ~33-day DHS shutdown, up 24% today, as Congress stalls on an immigration oversight deal. * Partial shutdown: TSA and Coast Guard hit hardest; now entering day 10. * Trend: Forecast jumped from ~15 days last

data.title: XRP Ledger launches Members-Only Bank Exchange, but XRP struggles under $1.50. XLS-81 allows gated trading venues for institutions. XRP fails to gain momentum, membership is for approved participants only. XRPL activated XLS-85 Token Escrow for all trustline-based tokens.
data.description: XRP Ledger has implemented the XLS-81 "Permissioned DEX" amendment, providing gated trading venues for regulated institutions. This feature allows approved participants to trade on a controlled version of XRPL's decentralized exchange. Access is restricted to institutions meeting compliance requirements, primarily targeting banks and brokers needing blockchain-based settlement and liquidity without interacting with fully open DeFi markets. Last week, XRP activated the XLS-85 Token Escrow, expanding native escrow functionality to trustline-based tokens like stablecoins and tokenized real-world assets. Despite these updates, XRP is struggling to regain momentum. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Perpetual Atomics Ltd, QSA Europe, QSA Global, and Reef Origin to collaborate on building radioisotope power systems in Europe.
data.description: Perpetual Atomics Ltd, a company based in Leicester, England, along with QSA Europe (operating under Loma Systems s.r.o.) in Dobřany, Czech Republic, QSA Global, Inc., and Reef Origin have recently signed a Memorandum of Understanding in Prague. This MOU signifies their joint effort in establishing an industrialized production line for radioisotope power systems in Europe. It extends the current partnership between QSA Global, Inc. and Perpetual Atomics Ltd, aiming to enhance the production capacity and technological capabilities for radioisotope power systems. This strategic alliance aims to bolster the production of radioisotope power systems in the region.

data.title: SmartCentres REIT declared $0.15417 per unit distribution for Feb 2026, totaling $1.85 annually, payable on Mar 16.
data.description: In Toronto, SmartCentres Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: SRU.UN) has declared a distribution of $0.15417 per unit for February 2026, amounting to $1.85 annually. This distribution will be paid on March 16, 2026, to unitholders recorded as of February 27, 2026. SmartCentres is recognized as one of Canada's biggest fully integrated REITs, known for its excellent performance and expansion.

data.title: Crypto market experiencing bear phase, following 4-year cycle despite changes. Institutions accumulate BTC and ETH. Retail investors in deep drawdowns with many altcoins down 70%.
data.description: Chief Investment Officer Matt Hougan from Bitwise Asset Management has stated that the cryptocurrency market is currently in a classic bear phase, similar to previous "crypto winters" in 2018 and 2022. Despite changes in catalysts like Bitcoin halving events, Hougan argues that the market is still following its traditional four-year cycle. This cycle persists due to market participants' belief in it, influencing their trading decisions and making it a self-reinforcing trend. Institutions were still accumulating Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) in late 2025, while retail investors and many alternative coins were experiencing significant declines, with some tokens plunging by over 70%. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Activist investor pushes Riot to shift to data center, ARK resumes buying Coinbase, shares surge.
data.description: An activist investor is pushing Riot Platforms to speed up its transition from being a bitcoin miner to focusing on data centers. Cathie Wood and her firm ARK have restarted buying shares of Coinbase. The news resulted in a surge for Riot Platforms, with their stock seeing a rise in values. These developments are significant in the financial market and highlight the shifting landscape within the cryptocurrency and technology industries.

data.title: Moderna stock surges after FDA agrees to review drugmaker's flu vaccine, reversing initial decision.
data.description: Stock of Moderna experienced a significant increase following the reversal by the Food and Drug Administration to reconsider the drugmaker's flu vaccine. The FDA's decision to review the vaccine led to a surge in Moderna's stock.

data.title: Camtek meets Q4 estimates on earnings, slightly beats on revenue, stock rises after modest outlook.
data.description: Camtek, a chip-gear manufacturer, met earnings forecasts in Q4 with revenue slightly surpassing expectations. Consequently, Camtek's stock saw an increase. The leading tech company's shares surged following the release of its Q4 report, which also included a conservative outlook.

data.title: Dream Office REIT announces February 2026 monthly distribution of 8.333 cents per REIT Unit. Payable on March 13, 2026.
data.description: In Toronto, Dream Office REIT (TSX: D.UN) revealed its February 2026 monthly distribution of 8.333 cents per REIT Unit, Series A, equivalent to $1.00 on an annual basis. This distribution will be paid out on March 13, 2026, to unitholders listed as of February 27, 2026. As an unincorporated, open-ended real estate investment trust, Dream Office REIT is a leading office landlord situated in downtown Toronto with a portfolio encompassing over 4.0 million square feet.

data.title: Heritage Distilling Holding Co. renamed IP Strategy Holdings Inc. on Feb 18, 2026 (Nasdaq: IPST) - GlobeNewswire.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, IP Strategy Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: IPST) revealed its name change from Heritage Distilling Holding Company, Inc. The switch officially took place at 12:01 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. This move signifies a strategic shift for the company, aiming to redefine its identity and market positioning. The transition represents a pivotal moment for IP Strategy, as it moves forward under the new name to drive growth and innovation within the industry. This development aligns with the company's vision for the future and underscores its commitment to adapt to evolving market dynamics.

data.title: Treasury bond auction announcement for RIKB 28 1115 and RIKB 38 0215, with payment deadline at 14:00 on Settlement Date.
data.description: The Government Debt Management will conduct an auction of Treasury bonds in the Series on the Auction Date between 10:30 am and 11:00 am. The bonds will have specific ISIN numbers and Maturity Dates as per the provided table. Payment for the Treasury bonds must reach the Central Bank by 14:00 on the Settlement Date. The Bonds will be electronically delivered on the same day. Buyers have the option to purchase an additional 10% as per Article 6 of the General Terms of Auction for Treasury bonds.

data.title: Hope For The Warriors gets $3 million grant for programs, infrastructure upgrades, and access to care.
data.description: Hope For The Warriors (HOPE) based in Springfield, Virginia, has been granted $3,000,000 by Lilly Endowment Inc. This funding aims to bolster leadership and workforce development within the organization. The grant will also be utilized for significant upgrades to operational systems and infrastructure supporting HOPE's programs nationwide. Another key focus will be on enhancing access to evidence-based care. Lilly Endowment is providing 18 grants to military and veterans service organizations to strengthen their ability to provide support.

data.title: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller shifts investments to Brazil, buys 3.55M EWZ shares worth $113M, exits Big Tech.
data.description: Renowned trader Stanley Druckenmiller is adjusting his investment strategy with a new focus on Brazilian assets. According to the latest 13F filing from his Duquesne Family Office, Druckenmiller has made a significant shift in his portfolio by reducing exposure to popular Silicon Valley stocks and increasing his position in the iShares MSCI Brazil ETF (NYSE: EWZ). The filing shows that Druckenmiller has purchased approximately 3.55 million shares of EWZ, amounting to over $113 million and ranking it as a top-10 holding. In addition to acquiring shares, Druckenmiller has also invested in EWZ call options, indicating a high level of confidence in a potential market rally. This strategic move aligns with Druckenmiller's reputation for anticipating market trends early. For more information, visit <website>.

data.title: Dream Industrial REIT (TSX: DIR.UN) announces February 2026 distribution of 5.833 cents per Unit (70 cents annualized) payable on March 13 to unitholders of record as at February 27. Global portfolio as of December 31, 2025.
data.description: Dream Industrial REIT (TSX: DIR.UN) disclosed its February 2026 monthly distribution at 5.833 cents per Unit (equivalent to 70 cents annually), payable on March 13, 2026 to unitholders recorded by February 27, 2026. By December 31, 2025, the Trust held a stake in a varied global portfolio of strategically situated industrial properties.
